sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n48344" key="qeofi/lion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θεοφίλ-ιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n48344.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">eyesalve invented by Theophilus</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg007:115" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.115</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0744.tlg001:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Trall.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
